post.description: Lists all available product categories in the catalog.
Retrieves the attributes for a specified product category.
Creates or updates a product in the catalog.
Retrieves content information for specified products.

@type.description:
A URL/resource name that uniquely identifies the type of the serialized
protocol buffer message. This string must contain at least
one "/" character. The last segment of the URL's path must represent
the fully qualified name of the type (as in
`path/google.protobuf.Duration`). The name should be in a canonical form
(e.g., leading "." is not accepted).

In practice, teams usually precompile into the binary all types that they
expect it to use in the context of Any. However, for URLs which use the
scheme `http`, `https`, or no scheme, one can optionally set up a type
server that maps type URLs to message definitions as follows:

* If no scheme is provided, `https` is assumed.
* An HTTP GET on the URL must yield a [google.protobuf.Type][]
  value in binary format, or produce an error.
* Applications are allowed to cache lookup results based on the
  URL, or have them precompiled into a binary to avoid any
  lookup. Therefore, binary compatibility needs to be preserved
  on changes to types. (Use versioned type names to manage
  breaking changes.)

Note: this functionality is not currently available in the official
protobuf release, and it is not used for type URLs beginning with
type.googleapis.com. As of May 2023, there are no widely used type server
implementations and no plans to implement one.

Schemes other than `http`, `https` (or the empty scheme) might be
used with implementation specific semantics.

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

rpcStatus.description:
The `Status` type defines a logical error model that is suitable for
different programming environments, including REST APIs and RPC APIs. It is
used by [gRPC](https://github.com/grpc). Each `Status` message contains
three pieces of data: error code, error message, and error details.

You can find out more about this error model and how to work with it in the
[API Design Guide](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/errors).

value.description:
value for the attribute. 
The format should align with the specified AttributeType for the attribute in the category.
The value should also adhere to any additional validation rules defined for the attribute.

language.description:
language code for the attribute value.
this is required only if the attribute is localizable.
for non-localizable attributes, this field should be omitted.

sort.description:
sort order for the attribute value (starting at 1).
this is required only if the attribute is multivalued to specify the order of values.
for single valued attributes, this field should be omitted.

values.description:
array of values for the attribute.
For single/non-localizable attributes, provide a single value in the array.
For localizable attributes, provide separate values for each language using the desired language code.
For multivalued attributes, provide multiple values in the desired sort order.

partner_sku.description: Your internal unique identifier for this specific variation. It has to be unique across all your products.

size.description: The specific size value for this SKU (e.g., Large, 42, S). It should reflect the actual label size.

is_mandatory.title: if True, attribute is required for product creation

is_facet.title: If True, attribute is indexed for customer search filters on the storefront

attribute_type.title: input format of the attribute value

is_localizable.title: If True, the value can differ based on the region or language

is_multivalued.title: if True, the attribute can have multiple values

max_values.title: max number of values allowed if attribute is multivalued

min_characters.title: minimum string length allowed for text attributes

max_characters.title: maximum string length allowed for text attributes

is_html_allowed.title: if True, HTML content is allowed in text attributes

allowed_html_tags.title: An exclusive list of specific HTML tags allowed, if is_html_allowed is True

number_min.title: minimum number allowed for numeric attributes

number_max.title: maximum number allowed for numeric attributes

is_negative_allowed.title: if True, numeric field accepts negative numbers

date_min.description: The earliest allowed date (ISO 8601 format) for datetime attributes.

date_max.description: The latest allowed date (ISO 8601 format) for datetime attributes.

min_size_in_kilobytes.title: minimum file size in kilobytes allowed for file attributes

max_size_in_kilobytes.title: maximum file size in kilobytes allowed for file attributes

allowed_mimetypes.title: list of allowed file formats for file attributes

additional_validation_regex.title: custom regex pattern text attributes must match

attribute_options.title: exclusive list of allowed options for select attributes

attribute_metric_units.title:
exclusive list of allowed metric units for metric attributes
metric attributes require both a numeric value and a unit

sku_parent.title: sku_parent obtained from product upsert API
sku_parent obtained for which the content information is provided

images.title: images associated with the product along with their statuses

url.title: The direct public URL where the image is hosted

categories.description:
A list of unique category codes.
These codes represent the full hierarchy path for a specific product type
(e.g., family-type-subtype).

category_code.title: category code representing the product's classification in the catalog obtained from categories/list API

completeness.title: content completeness percentage (0-100) based on required attributes for the category

missing_attributes.title: required attributes that are missing for the product to be considered complete

invalid_attributes.title: required attributes that have invalid values

sort.title: sorting order for the image gallery

review_status.title: validation status of the image after review (valid/invalid)

issues.title: issues found with the image, if image is invalid

status.title: status of the product in the quality control process

rejection_reasons.title: reasons for rejection, if the product was rejected

language.title: language code for which the status is provided

qc.title: quality control status of the product

overall_status.title:
overall status of the product (if product content is okay to go live)
for the listing to be active, content_completeness must be 100% and QC must be approved

errors.title: any errors related to the product content which needs to be addressed to make the product active

skus.title:
list of stock-keeping units
it needs to contain at least one SKU
in case of single SKU for a product, the size field is optional
in case of multiple SKUs (sizes) for a product, all SKUs must have the size field specified
in case of update, all SKUs must belong to the same parent product

category.title: category code representing the product's classification in the catalog obtained from categories/list API

attributes.title: dictionary of attribute codes to their corresponding values

sku_parent.title: sku_parent of the created or updated product

variants.title: product variants that were created or updated

partner_sku.title: partner provided SKU of the product variant
